PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2020 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Proposed Executor.

Ms. Friedeberg stated that they retained an heir search company, that they concentrated the search in Germany, that they focused on the half Sister and Ms. Moldenhauer's first marriage, that they had contacted the Son of Ms. Moldenhauer's second Husband and the heir search company concluded that there are no further routes to search. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that she made the heir search company aware of the deadlines and has requested a report, and that she is still waiting for a report from them. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Oct-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The Court stated that there is concern that not enough was done to find heirs. Ms. Friedeberg stated that the declaration in support of their search efforts has attached to it what was done in the conservatorship, that in the conservatorship matter they found that the two children of the Sister were Step-Children and that there is no indication that the Sister had any Children. Ms. Friedeberg also stated that the Decedent had a long term Attorney in Germany, that he confirmed that there are no other relatives, that the Decedent had a Boyfriend at the time the conservatorship was established, that the Boyfriend told them that Ms. Moldenhauer had no relatives, that he now lacks capacity and that they can hire an heir search company, but there are no leads in terms of any heirs. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to October 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to hire an heir search company and for filing of a declaration as to what was stated.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
